Team - Transformation

Our Team.

Our team comprises of highly motivated individuals who are passionate about helping the ones suffering due to their unpleasant life experiences. We are a group of people who are committed towards transforming the lives of the people dealing with Mental illnesses by empowering them and helping them attain a more peaceful and content life!

Our Certified Coaches

Dedication. Expertise. Passion.

"THE LIFE TRANSFORMATION COACH" program by the Indian Transformation Academy enables passionate individuals to have a successful career in the ever growing Mental health sector. Our Coaches are equipped with really powerful techniques from NLP, Hypnotherapy & Classic psychology which they use to help their clients heal from their mental health challenges.
